form.label: Threats Protection
form.description: Advanced Threat Protection Dashboard - IPS, DNS Protection, and Anti-Malware

search.query: index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="IPS" action="Block" | search $search_filter$ | stats dc(event_id) as total | eval total=if(isnull(total), 0, total)

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="DNS Protection" (action="Block" OR action="Sinkhole") | search $search_filter$ | stats dc(event_id) as total | eval total=if(isnull(total), 0, total)
index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Suspicious Activity" action="Monitor" | search $search_filter$ | stats dc(event_id) as total | eval total=if(isnull(total), 0, total)

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Anti Malware" action="Block" (threat_verdict="virus_found" OR threat_verdict="suspicious") | search $search_filter$ | stats dc(event_id) as total | eval total=if(isnull(total), 0, total)

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Dynamic Prevention" action="Dynamic Control Applied" | search $search_filter$ | stats dc(host_ip) as total | eval total=if(isnull(total), 0, total)
index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Dynamic Prevention" action="Block" | search $search_filter$ | stats dc(event_id) as total | eval total=if(isnull(total), 0, total)

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" (event_sub_type="Anti Malware" OR event_sub_type="IPS" OR event_sub_type="DNS Protection") | search (event_sub_type="IPS") OR (event_sub_type="DNS Protection") OR (event_sub_type="Anti Malware" threat_verdict!="clean") | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count by threat_name | sort -count | head 5

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" (event_sub_type="Anti Malware" OR event_sub_type="IPS" OR event_sub_type="DNS Protection") | search (event_sub_type="IPS") OR (event_sub_type="DNS Protection") OR (event_sub_type="Anti Malware" threat_verdict!="clean") | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | timechart span=1h count by event_sub_type

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" (event_sub_type="IPS" OR event_sub_type="Anti Malware") | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | eval country=src_country_code | stats dc(event_id) by country | sort -count | head 5

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Dynamic Prevention" action="Dynamic Control Applied" | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats dc(threat_name) as "Detected Threats", dc(dynamic_control_ids{}) as "Controls", values(dynamic_control_threat_categories{}) as "Control Categories", max(rule_expiration_time) as latest_expiration by src_ip | eval "Latest Status"=case( latest_expiration > now(), "Active", latest_expiration <= now(), "Expired", 1=1, "Unknown" ) | eval "Control Categories"=mvjoin('Control Categories', ", ") | rename src_ip as "Host" | fields "Host" "Detected Threats" "Controls" "Control Categories" "Latest Status" | sort -"Detected Threats" | head 10

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Dynamic Prevention" (action="Block" OR action="Monitor") | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats values(action) as "Actions", count as "# Events" by host_ip | rename host_ip as "Host" | sort -"# Events" | head 10
index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type=$ips_event_type$ | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count by threat_type | sort -count

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type=$ips_event_type$ | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count as "# Events" by src_ip | rename src_ip as "Hosts" | sort -"# Events" | head 5

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type=$ips_event_type$ | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count as "# Events" by vpn_user_email | rename vpn_user_email as "Users" | sort -"# Events" | head 5
index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="DNS Protection" | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count by dns_protection_category | sort -count

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="DNS Protection" | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count as "# Events" by dns_query | rename dns_query as "Domains" | sort -"# Events" | head 5

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="DNS Protection" | search $search_filter$ | dedup event_id | stats count as "# Events" by src_ip | rename src_ip as "Hosts" | sort -"# Events" | head 5

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Anti Malware" (threat_verdict="suspicious" OR threat_verdict="virus_found") | search $search_filter$ | eval filter_match=if("$malware_filter$"="*", 1, if(threat_verdict="$malware_filter$", 1, 0)) | search filter_match=1 | dedup event_id | stats count by file_name | sort -count | head 10

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Anti Malware" (threat_verdict="suspicious" OR threat_verdict="virus_found") | search $search_filter$ | eval filter_match=if("$malware_filter$"="*", 1, if(threat_verdict="$malware_filter$", 1, 0)) | search filter_match=1 | dedup event_id | stats count as "# Events" by src_ip | rename src_ip as "Hosts" | sort -"# Events" | head 5

index=$form.index$ sourcetype="cato:security" event_sub_type="Anti Malware" (threat_verdict="suspicious" OR threat_verdict="virus_found") | search $search_filter$ | eval filter_match=if("$malware_filter$"="*", 1, if(threat_verdict="$malware_filter$", 1, 0)) | search filter_match=1 | dedup event_id | stats count as "# Events" by vpn_user_email | rename vpn_user_email as "Users" | sort -"# Events" | head 5
